+<suite name="BDD Suite" parallel="tests" thread-count="1">
+  <listeners>

+  </listeners>
+    <test name="Chrome Tests">
+        <parameter name="browser" value="chrome"/>
+        <classes>
+            <class name="cucumberConfig.TestNGTestRunner"/>
+        </classes>
+    </test>
+</suite>
